module.name: tool
module.purpose: Top-level marix-tool crate (lib marix_tool) that defines the per-tool ToolProgram interface and compiles one executable per native tool program. Cargo.toml now depends on marix-protocol, and ToolProgram uses marix_protocol::ToolPreview.

childModules.name: native
childModules.purpose: Concrete native tool programs grouped by category: filesystem tools under file/ and shell command execution under shell/. Native previews wrap schema constants in typed ToolInputSchema/ToolOutputSchema content wrappers and invoke() implementations perform real IO and return JSON results.
